message:
feat(plan): implement crash-consistent mission journal with compaction and replay

Add PauseRequested, ResumeRequested, AbortRequested, ApprovalRequested
lifecycle transition variants. Implement MissionJournal with append-only
entries (LifecycleTransition, KillSwitchChange, AssignmentOutcome,
Checkpoint, RecoveryMarker), sequential hash chaining, correlation index,
checkpoint/compact_before/replay_from_checkpoint operations, and
MissionJournalReplayReport.

Enable journal proptest suite (was behind placeholder feature flag).
Add compacting_away_latest_checkpoint test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
